evals.name: prd-to-ears-conversion
evals.prompt: PRD: 'The auth service shall validate user credentials within 200ms. When a user submits an invalid password, the service shall return 401 and log the attempt. If 5 failed attempts occur within 10 minutes, the service shall lock the account for 30 minutes.'
expected_reqs: REQ-001: Event-Driven — When user submits credentials, service shall validate within 200ms
REQ-002: Unwanted Behavior — If password invalid, service shall return 401 and log
REQ-003: Unwanted Behavior — If 5 failed attempts in 10 min, service shall lock for 30 min

assertions.text: All 3 EARS rows present with correct pattern
All REQs end with measurable outcome (200ms, 401, 5/10min, 30min)

evals.name: vague-prompt-refusal
evals.prompt: Make the system user-friendly and fast.
evals.expected_outcome: BLOCKED — return with the request: 'Replace with measurable outcomes'

assertions.text: Skill refuses to write the spec
Returns 5 ambiguity failures (no actor, no trigger, no outcome, no scope, no success criteria)

evals.name: unbounded-scope-rejection
evals.prompt: Build a comprehensive user management system.
evals.expected_outcome: BLOCKED — return with: 'Scope not bounded. List what is in vs out of scope.'

assertions.text: Asks for out-of-scope statement before proceeding

evals.name: state-driven-pattern
evals.prompt: While the user is unauthenticated, the API shall return 401 for protected routes.
expected_reqs: REQ-001: State-Driven — While user unauthenticated, API shall return 401 for protected routes

evals.name: optional-feature-pattern
evals.prompt: Where 2FA is enabled, the system shall require a TOTP token in addition to the password.
expected_reqs: REQ-001: Optional — Where 2FA enabled, system shall require TOTP token with password
